summary: Convergence-bar scenario: operator gives a URL via inline text and asks the composer to fetch it and produce a small downstream pipeline. The historical failure mode this catches is the model treating the URL string as a filesystem path on the source plugin (text/csv/json) rather than wiring create_blob plus a web_scrape transform. GREEN requires a web_scrape node in the chain so the URL is actually fetched, with a text source feeding a URL field forward. The repair loop (max=2) must converge without asking the user.
opening_prompt: Please build a pipeline that fetches the homepage of https://www.iana.org/help/example-domains and writes a JSONL summary line per page (just url and a content snippet of the first 200 characters). Use OpenRouter with anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet for any LLM step.

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Anti-tail-offer rule applies; convergence bar additionally forbids the model asking technical clarifications.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: Server-injected from service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() on completion-claim with failed preflight.

green_criteria.must_have_node_chain_in_order_note: URL handling without web_scrape means the model treated the URL as a filesystem path or as inline content. Either is a convergence failure.
green_criteria.max_repair_turns_note: First-pass success or one internal repair; no user clarification turns. Populated by service.py once Step 4 ships.
